raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card was charged XXXX times from XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX XXXX. I Did not receive any suspicious activity message from XXXX Credit card. During this period of time, I was working in XXXX XXXX IL. Have the prove that I did not travel in Florida, where the credit card was charged. 
I received a bank statement on XX/XX/XXXX with overcharge amount of {$4200.00} dollars and XXXX cents. According to XXXX Credit card statements the card was used in XXXX XXXX FL ; XXXX FL ; XXXX Fl. 
I contacted XXXX Credit Card as soon as I discovered the fraudulent activities. They opened the investigation. After XXXX months I received again the bank statement stating that I still owe the bank for fraudulent charges. I was calling XXXX Credit card almost every week in order to get some clarity. In XX/XX/XXXX I went and made a police report regarding this matter in local XXXX ( IL ) Police department. 
I am trying to seek help for clearing my credit history, and find responsible for this fraudulent activity.
